scraping_instructions.return_format: business_name, url_or_no_website_flag, review_count, rating, town, category, phone
scraping_instructions.ssl_check_required: YES — tag each URL as ssl=true (HTTPS) or ssl=false (HTTP). Primary signal.
scraping_instructions.mobile_check: Secondary — Playwright screenshot or PageSpeed API check at mobile viewport.
scraping_instructions.no_website_flag: If no website found via Google Maps listing, flag no_website=true.

signal_assignment_note: No leads to assign signals to. All signal assignments await Batch 5 Ryedale raw data. When data arrives, BRAIN runs full waterfall same session. Priority waterfall: ssl → PAS → first-name subject; mobile → PAS; no_website → BAB (20+ reviews); social_high_review → AIDA (100+ reviews).

waterfall_logic.confirmed_winner: ssl → PAS → first-name subject — 3/3 INTERESTED leads used this exact combination. Non-negotiable core of Batch 5.

priority_3.qualification: 4★+ AND 20+ reviews (Ryedale — lowered from 50+ in Batch 4)
